product_categories_json.name: FIRE SUPPRESSION

parent_json.name: KITCHEN
parent_json.description: KITCHEN

product_categories_json.description: Sheffield Africa provides advanced commercial kitchen fire suppression systems designed for the unique risks of high-heat, grease-laden environments. Our solutions include automatic wet-chemical agents, heat sensors, and integrated shut-off systems that comply with global standards allowing rapid detection and control of fires while minimizing damage and downtime. Partner with Sheffield Africa to ensure your kitchen is safe, compliant and fully protected.
